{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_6934b0864793426eb12fa8f2","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t//! This module implements:\n4\t//! - Write deduplication via idempotency keys\n5\t//! - Read query coalescing for identical concurrent searches\n6\t\n7\tuse crate::error::{MiroirError, Result};\n8\tuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\n9\tuse serde_json::Value;\n10\tuse std::collections::{BTreeMap, HashMap};\n11\tuse std::sync::Arc;\n12\tuse std::time::{Duration, Instant, SystemTime};\n13\tuse tokio::sync::{broadcast, RwLock};\n14\t\n15\t/// Canonicalize a JSON value for fingerprinting.\n16\t///\n17\t/// Sorts object keys by name to ensure consistent representation\n18\t/// regardless of original key order. This is important for query\n19\t/// coalescing where `{q: \"test\", limit: 10}` and `{limit: 10, q: \"test\"}`\n20\t/// should be considered identical.\n21\tpub fn canonicalize_json(value: &Value) -> String {\n22\t    match value {\n23\t        Value::Object(map) => {\n24\t            let mut sorted = BTreeMap::new();\n25\t            for (k, v) in map {\n26\t                sorted.insert(k.clone(), canonicalize_json_value(v));\n27\t            }\n28\t            serde_json::to_string(&sorted).unwrap_or_default()\n29\t        }\n30\t        Value::Array(arr) => {\n31\t            let canonical: Vec<Value> = arr.iter().map(canonicalize_json_value).collect();\n32\t            serde_json::to_string(&canonical).unwrap_or_default()\n33\t        }\n34\t        _ => serde_json::to_string(value).unwrap_or_default(),\n35\t    }\n36\t}\n37\t\n38\t/// Helper to canonicalize a JSON value, returning a Value instead of String.\n39\tfn canonicalize_json_value(value: &Value) -> Value {\n40\t    match value {\n41\t        Value::Object(map) => {\n42\t            let mut sorted = BTreeMap::new();\n43\t            for (k, v) in map {\n44\t                sorted.insert(k.clone(), canonicalize_json_value(v));\n45\t            }\n46\t            // Convert BTreeMap to serde_json::Map\n47\t            let mut result_map = serde_json::Map::new();\n48\t            for (k, v) in sorted {\n49\t                result_map.insert(k, v);\n50\t            }\n51\t            Value::Object(result_map)\n52\t        }\n53\t        Value::Array(arr) => {\n54\t            let canonical: Vec<Value> = arr.iter().map(canonicalize_json_value).collect();\n55\t            Value::Array(canonical)\n56\t        }\n57\t        _ => value.clone(),\n58\t    }\n59\t}\n60\t\n61\t/// Idempotency cache entry.\n62\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n63\tpub struct IdempotencyEntry {\n64\t    /// SHA256 hash of the request body.\n65\t    pub cache for write deduplication.\n73\tpub struct IdempotencyCache {\n74\t    /// key -> (body_hash, mtask_id, expires_at)\n75\t    cache: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<String, IdempotencyEntry>>>,\n76\t    ///  ttl_secs,\n89\t        }\n90\t    }\n91\t\n92\t    /// Check for a duplicate write.\n93\t    ///\n94\t    /// Returns `Some(mtask_id)` if the key exists and body hash matches.\n95\t    /// Returns `Err` if the key exists but body hash differs.\n96\t    /// Returns `None` if the key is not found (caller should process).\n97\t    pub async fn check(&self, key: &str, body_hash: &str) -> Result<Option<String>> {\n98\t        let mut cache = self.cache.write().await;\n99\t        self.prune_expired_locked(&mut cache);\n100\t\n101\t        if let Some(entry) = cache.get(key) {\n102\t            if entry.body_hash == body_hash {\n103\t                return Ok(Some(entry.mtask_id.clone()));\n104\t            } else {\n105\t                return Err(MiroirError::IdempotencyKeyReused);\n106\t            }\n107\t        }\n108\t        Ok(None)\n109\t    }\n110\t\n111\t    /// Insert a new idempotency entry.\n112\t    pub async fn insert(&self, entries (simple FIFO for now)\n117\t        if cache.len() >= self.max_entries {\n118\t            // Remove oldest entry (first key)\n119\t            if let Some(k) = cache.keys().next().cloned() {\n120\t                cache.remove(&k);\n121\t            }\n122\t        }\n123\t\n124\t        let now = SystemTime::now()\n125\t            .duration_since(SystemTime::UNIX_EPOCH)\n126\t            .unwrap_or_default()\n127\t            .as_secs();\n128\t        let expires_at = now + self.ttl_secs;\n129\t\n130\t        cache.insert(key, IdempotencyEntry {\n131\t            body_hash,\n132\t            mtask_id,\n133\t            expires_at,\n134\t        });\n135\t    }\n136\t\n137\t    /// Prune expired entries (must hold write lock).\n138\t    fn prune_expired_locked(&self, cache: &mut .as_secs();\n143\t        cache.retain(|_, v| v.expires_at > now);\n144\t    }\n145\t\n146\t    /// Get current cache size.\n147\t    pub async fn size(&self) -> usize {\n148\t self.max_subscribers {\n219\t                return Some(pq.tx.subscribe());\n220\t            }\n221\t        }\n222\t        None\n223\t    }\n224\t\n225\t    /// Register a new pending QueryFingerprint,\n231\t    ) -> Result<broadcast::Sender<Vec<u8>>> {\n232\t        let mut pending = self.pending.write().await;\n233\t        self.prune_stale_locked(&mut pending);\n234\t\n235\t  fn report_exploration(&self) {\n38\t        self.metrics.inc_replica_selection_exploration();\n39\t    }\n40\t}\n41\t\n42\t/// Hash a value for logging (obfuscates sensitive data like IPs).\n43\tfn hash_for_log(value: &str) -> String {\n44\t    use std::hash::{Hash, Hasher};\n45\t    let mut hasher = std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher::new();\n46\t    value.hash(&mut hasher);\n47\t    format!(\"{:016x}\", hasher.finish())\n48\t}\n49\t\n50\t/// Node client implementation using the HTTP client.\n51\t///\n52\t/// Wraps each node call with Prometheus metrics recording for\n53\t/// `miroir_node_request_duration_seconds` and `miroir_node_errors_total`.\n54\tpub struct ProxyNodeClient {\n55\t    client: Arc<crate::client::HttpClient>,\n56\t    metrics: crate::middleware::Metrics,\n57\t    replica_selector: Option<Arc<miroir_core::replica_selection::ReplicaSelector>>,\n58\t}\n59\t\n60\timpl ProxyNodeClient {\n61\t    pub fn new(\n62\t        client: Arc<crate::client::HttpClient>,\n63\t        metrics: crate::middleware::Metrics,\n64\t        replica_selector: Option<Arc<miroir_core::replica_selection::ReplicaSelector>>,\n65\t    ) -> Self {\n66\t        Self { client, metrics, replica_selector }\n67\t    }\n68\t}\n69\t\n70\t#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\n71\timpl NodeClient for ProxyNodeClient {\n72\t    async fn search_node(\n73\t        &self,\n74\t        node: &miroir_core::topology::NodeId,\n75\t        address: &str,\n76\t        request: &SearchRequest,\n77\t    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, miroir_core::scatter::NodeError> {\n78\t        let start = Instant::now();\n79\t        let result = self.client.search_node(node, address, request).await;\n80\t        let elapsed = start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n81\t        self.metrics.record_node_request_duration(node.as_str(), \"search\", elapsed);\n82\t        if let Err(ref e) = result {\n83\t            self.metrics.inc_node_errors(node.as_str(), error_label(e));\n84\t        }\n85\t        result\n86\t    }\n87\t\n88\t    async fn preflight_node(\n89\t        &self,\n90\t        node: &miroir_core::topology::NodeId,\n91\t        address: &str,\n92\t        request: &miroir_core::scatter::PreflightRequest,\n93\t    ) -> std::result::Result<miroir_core::scatter::PreflightResponse, miroir_core::scatter::NodeError> {\n94\t        let start = Instant::now();\n95\t        let result = self.client.preflight_node(node, address, request).await;\n96\t        let elapsed = start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n97\t        self.metrics.record_node_request_duration(node.as_str(), \"preflight\", elapsed);\n98\t        if let Err(ref e) = result {\n99\t            self.metrics.inc_node_errors(node.as_str(), error_label(e));\n100\t        }\n101\t        result\n102\t    }\n103\t}\n104\t\n105\tfn error_label(e: &miroir_core::scatter::NodeError) -> &'static str {\n106\t    match e {\n107\t        miroir_core::scatter::NodeError::NetworkError(_) => \"network\",\n108\t        miroir_core::scatter::NodeError::HttpError { .. } => \"http\",\n109\t        miroir_core::scatter::NodeError::Timeout => \"timeout\",\n110\t    }\n111\t}\n112\t\n113\tpub fn router<S>() -> axum::Router<S>\n114\twhere\n115\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n116\t{\n117\t    axum::Router::new()\n118\t        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(search_handler))\n119\t}\n120\t\n121\t/// Search request body.\n122\t#[derive(Deserialize)]\n123\tstruct SearchRequestBody {\n124\t    q: Option<String>,\n125\t    offset: Option<usize>,\n126\t    limit: Option<usize>,\n127\t    filter: Option<Value>,\n128\t    facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n129\t    #[serde(rename = \"rankingScore\")]\n130\t    ranking_score: Option<bool>,\n131\t    #[serde(flatten)]\n132\t    rest: Value,\n133\t}\n134\t\n135\timpl std::fmt::Debug for SearchRequestBody {\n136\t    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {\n137\t        f.debug_struct(\"SearchRequestBody\")\n138\t            .field(\"q\", &\"[redacted]\")\n139\t            .field(\"offset\", &self.offset)\n140\t            .field(\"limit\", &self.limit)\n141\t            .field(\"filter\", &\"[redacted]\")\n142\t            .field(\"facets\", &self.facets)\n143\t            .field(\"ranking_score\", &self.ranking_score)\n144\t            .finish_non_exhaustive()\n145\t    }\n146\t}\n147\t\n148\t/// Search handler with DFS global-IDF preflight (OP#4).\n149\t///\n150\t/// This handler implements the `dfs_query_then_fetch` pattern:\n151\t/// 1. **Preflight phase**: Send term-frequency query to all shards, aggregate\n152\t///    global document frequencies at the coordinator.\n153\t/// 2. **Search phase**: Send the search query with global IDF attached so that\n154\t///    scoring uses corpus-wide statistics instead of per-shard local IDF.\n155\t///\n156\t/// Returns `X-Miroir-Degraded: shards=X,Y,Z` header when any shards are unavailable.\n157\t/// Strips `_miroir_shard` from all hits; strips `_rankingScore` unless client\n158\t/// explicitly requested it.\n159\t///\n160\t/// Session pinning (plan §13.6): If `X-Miroir-Session` header is present and\n161\t/// the session has a pending write, routes to the pinned group for read-your-writes.\n162\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n163\tasync fn search_handler(\n164\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n165\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n166\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n167\t    session_id: Option<Extension<SessionId>>,\n168\t    Json(body): Json<SearchRequestBody>,\n169\t) -> Result<Response, StatusCode> {\n170\t    let start = Instant::now();\n171\t    let client_requested_score = body.ranking_score.unwrap_or(false);\n172\t\n173\t    // Extract session ID from request extensions (set by session_pinning_middleware)\n174\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n175\t        let s = ext.0;\n176\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n177\t    });\n178\t\n179\t    // Extract source IP from X-Forwarded-For or X-Real-IP (trust proxy)\n180\t    let source_ip = headers\n181\t        .get(\"x-forwarded-for\")\n182\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n183\t        .and_then(|s| s.split(',').next())\n184\t        .or_else(|| headers.get(\"x-real-ip\").and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok()))\n185\t        .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n186\t        .trim()\n187\t        .to_string();\n188\t\n189\t    // Check rate limit for search UI (plan §4)\n190\t    let (limit, window_seconds) = match parse_rate_limit(&state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip) {\n191\t        Ok(parsed) => parsed,\n192\t        Err(e) => {\n193\t            warn!(error = %e, \"invalid search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip config, using default\");\n194\t            (60, 60) // Default: 60 requests per minute\n195\t        }\n196\t    };\n197\t\n198\t    let backend = state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.backend.as_str();\n199\t    if backend == \"redis\" {\n200\t        if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n201\t            match redis.check_rate_limit_search_ui(&source_ip, limit, window_seconds) {\n202\t                Ok((allowed, _wait_seconds)) => {\n203\t                    if !allowed {\n204\t                        warn!(\n205\t                            source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n206\t                            \"search UI rate limited (redis)\"\n207\t                        );\n208\t                        return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n209\t                    }\n210\t                    // Allowed, proceed\n211\t                }\n212\t                Err(e) => {\n213\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to check search UI rate limit\");\n214\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n215\t                }\n216\t            }\n217\t        }\n218\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n219\t        let (allowed, _wait_seconds) = state.local_search_ui_rate_limiter.check(\n220\t            &source_ip,\n221\t            limit,\n222\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n223\t        );\n224\t        if !allowed {\n225\t            warn!(\n226\t                source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n227\t                \"search UI rate limited (local backend)\"\n228\t            );\n229\t            return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n230\t        }\n231\t    }\n232\t\n233\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n234\t    // Aliases are resolved at routing time; resolved index is used for scatter planning\n235\t    let (effective_index, resolved_targets) = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n236\t        let targets = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n237\t        state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n238\t        if targets != vec![index.clone()] {\n239\t            // It's an alias\n240\t            (index.clone(), targets)\n241\t        } else {\n242\t            // Not an alias - use index directly\n243\t            (index.clone(), vec![index.clone()])\n244\t        }\n245\t    } else {\n246\t        // Aliases disabled - use index directly\n247\t        (index.clone(), vec![index.clone()])\n248\t    };\n249\t\n250\t    // Session pinning logic (plan §13.6): Check if session has pending write\n251\t    let (pinned_group, strategy_label) = if let Some(ref sid) = sid {\n252\t        if let Some(group) = state.session_manager.get_pinned_group(sid).await {\n253\t            // Session has a pending write - apply wait strategy\n254\t            let strategy = state.session_manager.wait_strategy();\n255\t            match strategy {\n256\t                WaitStrategy::Block => {\n257\t                    // Block until write completes or timeout\n258\t                    let max_wait = state.session_manager.max_wait_duration();\n259\t                    let wait_start = std::time::Instant::now();\n260\t                    match state.session_manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n261\t                        sid,\n262\t                        &state.task_registry,\n263\t                        max_wait,\n264\t                    ).await {\n265\t                        Ok(true) => {\n266\t                            // Write succeeded, clear pin and use normal routing\n267\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n268\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n269\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"block\");\n270\t                            (None, Some(\"block_success\"))\n271\t                        }\n272\t                        Ok(false) => {\n273\t                            // Write failed, clear pin\n274\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n275\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n276\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n277\t                            (None, Some(\"block_failed\"))\n278\t                        }\n279\t                        Err(_) => {\n280\t                            // Timeout - still route to pinned group (best effort)\n281\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n282\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n283\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n284\t                            (Some(group), Some(\"block_timeout\"))\n285\t                        }\n286\t                    }\n287\t                }\n288\t                WaitStrategy::RoutePin => {\n289\t                    // Route to pinned group without waiting\n290\t                    state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"route_pin\");\n291\t                    (Some(group), Some(\"route_pin\"))\n292\t                }\n293\t            }\n294\t        } else {\n295\t            // No pending write - normal routing\n296\t            (None, None)\n297\t        }\n298\t    } else {\n299\t        // No session header - normal routing\n300\t        (None, None)\n301\t    };\n302\t\n303\t    // Log session pinning decision for observability\n304\t    if let Some(label) = strategy_label {\n305\t        debug!(\n306\t            session_id = ?sid,\n307\t            pinned_group = pinned_group,\n308\t            strategy = label,\n309\t            \"session pinning applied\"\n310\t        );\n311\t    }\n312\t\n313\t    // Query coalescing (plan §13.10): Check for identical in-flight queries\n314\t    // Skip for multi-target aliases (each target is different)\n315\t    if state.config.query_coalescing.enabled && resolved_targets.len() == 1 {\n316\t        // Build fingerprint from canonicalized query body + index + settings version\n317\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n318\t        let query_body = serde_json::to_value(&body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n319\t        let fingerprint = QueryFingerprint::new(effective_index.clone(), &query_body, settings_version);\n320\t\n321\t        // Try to coalesce with an existing in-flight query\n322\t        if let Some(mut rx) = state.query_coalescer.try_coalesce(fingerprint.clone()).await {\n323\t            // Successfully subscribed to an in-flight query - wait for its result\n324\t            state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_hits();\n325\t            debug!(\n326\t                index = %effective_index,\n327\t                \"query coalesced: waiting for in-flight query result\"\n328\t            );\n329\t\n330\t            // Wait for the response (with timeout matching the scatter timeout)\n331\t            let timeout = Duration::from_millis(state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms);\n332\t            let response_bytes = tokio::time::timeout(timeout, async move {\n333\t                rx.recv().await\n334\t            }).await;\n335\t\n336\t            match response_bytes {\n337\t                Ok(Ok(response_bytes)) => {\n338\t                    // Received response from coalesced query\n339\t                    let response_body: Value = match serde_json::from_slice(&response_bytes) {\n340\t                        Ok(v) => v,\n341\t                        Err(e) => {\n342\t                            error!(error = %e, \"failed to deserialize coalesced query response\");\n343\t                            return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);\n344\t                        }\n345\t                    };\n346\t\n347\t                    // Build response with appropriate headers\n348\t                    let mut response = Response::builder()\n349\t                        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n350\t                        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n351\t\n352\t                    // Add settings headers\n353\t                    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(&effective_index).await {\n354\t                        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n355\t                    }\n356\t                    if settings_version > 0 {\n357\t                        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", settings_version.to_string());\n358\t                    }\n359\t\n360\t                    let response = response\n361\t                        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&response_body).unwrap()))\n362\t                        .unwrap();\n363\t\n364\t                    tracing::info!(\n365\t                        target: \"miroir.search_coalesced\",\n366\t                        index = %effective_index,\n367\t                        duration_ms = start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,\n368\t                        \"coalesced search completed\"\n369\t                    );\n370\t\n371\t                    return Ok(response);\n372\t                }\n373\t                Ok(Err(_)) => {\n374\t                    // Channel closed without receiving response - proceed with normal scatter\n375\t                    debug!(\"coalesced query channel closed, proceeding with normal scatter\");\n376\t                }\n377\t                Err(_) => {\n378\t                    // Timeout waiting for coalesced query - proceed with normal scatter\n379\t                    debug!(\"timeout waiting for coalesced query, proceeding with normal scatter\");\n380\t                }\n381\t            }\n382\t        }\n383\t    }\n384\t\n385\t    // Handle multi-target alias fanout (plan §13.7, §13.11, §13.17)\n386\t    // Multi-target aliases (ILM read_alias) require fanning out to all targets\n387\t    // and merging results by _rankingScore\n388\t    if resolved_targets.len() > 1 {\n389\t        return search_multi_targets(\n390\t            resolved_targets,\n391\t            body,\n392\t            state,\n393\t            headers,\n394\t            sid,\n395\t            client_requested_score,\n396\t        ).await;\n397\t    }\n398\t\n399\t    // Get the scoped key for this index (plan §13.21).\n400\t    // If a scoped key exists, use primary_key (or previous_key during rotation overlap).\n401\t    // If no scoped key exists yet, fall back to node_master_key for initial setup.\n402\t    let search_key = if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n403\t        if let Ok(Some(sk)) = redis.get_search_ui_scoped_key(&effective_index) {\n404\t            // Refresh scoped-key beacon so the rotation leader knows this pod is serving\n405\t            // requests for this index at the current generation (plan §13.21).\n406\t            let _ = redis.observe_search_ui_scoped_key(\n407\t                &state.pod_id,\n408\t                &index,\n409\t                sk.generation,\n410\t            );\n411\t\n412\t            // Use primary_key; previous_key is the overlap fallback (both are valid in Meilisearch)\n413\t            sk.primary_key\n414\t        } else {\n415\t            // No scoped key yet — fall back to node_master_key for initial setup\n416\t            state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n417\t        }\n418\t    } else {\n419\t        // No Redis store — fall back to node_master_key (single-pod dev mode)\n420\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n421\t    };\n422\t\n423\t    // Extract X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version header (plan §13.5)\n424\t    let min_settings_version = headers\n425\t        .get(\"X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version\")\n426\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n427\t        .and_then(|s| s.parse::<u64>().ok());\n428\t\n429\t    // Use live topology from shared state (updated by health checker)\n430\t    let topo = state.topology.read().await;\n431\t    let policy = match state.config.scatter.unavailable_shard_policy.as_str() {\n432\t        \"partial\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial,\n433\t        \"error\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Error,\n434\t        \"fallback\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback,\n435\t        _ => return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR),\n436\t    };\n437\t\n438\t    // Plan scatter using live topology (span for plan construction)\n439\t    let plan = {\n440\t        let _plan_span = tracing::info_span!(\n441\t            \"scatter_plan\",\n442\t            replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups,\n443\t            shards = state.config.shards,\n444\t            rf = state.config.replication_factor,\n445\t            min_settings_version,\n446\t            pinned_group = ?pinned_group,\n447\t            strategy = %state.config.replica_selection.strategy,\n448\t        ).entered();\n449\t\n450\t        // Determine if we should use adaptive selection\n451\t        let use_adaptive = state.config.replica_selection.strategy == \"adaptive\";\n452\t        let replica_selector_ref = if use_adaptive {\n453\t            Some(state.replica_selector.as_ref())\n454\t        } else {\n455\t            None\n456\t        };\n457\t\n458\t        // Session pinning: if pinned_group is set, use group-specific planning\n459\t        if let Some(group) = pinned_group {\n460\t            match plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n461\t                &topo,\n462\t                0,\n463\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n464\t                state.config.shards,\n465\t                group,\n466\t                replica_selector_ref,\n467\t            ).await {\n468\t                Some(p) => p,\n469\t                None => {\n470\t                    // Pinned group not available - fall back to normal planning\n471\t                    // This can happen if the pinned group has failed\n472\t                    warn!(\n473\t                        pinned_group = group,\n474\t                        \"pinned group unavailable, falling back to normal routing\"\n475\t                    );\n476\t                    plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n477\t                }\n478\t            }\n479\t        } else if let Some(floor) = min_settings_version {\n480\t            // If client provided a min settings version floor, use version-filtered planning\n481\t            // Clone the settings broadcast for version checking\n482\t            let settings_broadcast = state.settings_broadcast.clone();\n483\t            let plan_result = plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n484\t                &topo,\n485\t                0,\n486\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n487\t                state.config.shards,\n488\t                &index,\n489\t                floor,\n490\t                &move |idx, node_id| {\n491\t                    // Use a blocking task wrapper since we're in a sync context\n492\t                    let sb = settings_broadcast.clone();\n493\t                    let idx = idx.to_string();\n494\t                    let node_id = node_id.to_string();\n495\t                    tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n496\t                        tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n497\t                            sb.node_version(&idx, &node_id).await\n498\t                        })\n499\t                    })\n500\t                },\n501\t                replica_selector_ref,\n502\t            ).await;\n503\t\n504\t            match plan_result {\n505\t                Some(p) => p,\n506\t                None => {\n507\t                    // No covering set could be assembled after filtering by version floor\n508\t                    let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n509\t                        MiroirCode::SettingsVersionStale,\n510\t                        format!(\n511\t                            \"no covering set available for settings version floor {} on index '{}'\",\n512\t                            floor, index\n513\t                        ),\n514\t                    );\n515\t                    return Err(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);\n516\t                }\n517\t            }\n518\t        } else {\n519\t            // No version floor requested, use normal planning\n520\t            plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n521\t        }\n522\t    };\n523\t    let node_count = plan.shard_to_node.len() as u64;\n524\t\n525\t    // Record scatter fan-out size before executing\n526\t    state.metrics.record_scatter_fan_out(node_count);\n527\t\n528\t    // Build search request\n529\t    let search_req = SearchRequest {\n530\t        index_uid: effective_index.clone(),\n531\t        query: body.q,\n532\t        offset: body.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n533\t        limit: body.limit.unwrap_or(20),\n534\t        filter: body.filter,\n535\t        facets: body.facets,\n536\t        ranking_score: client_requested_score,\n537\t        body: body.rest,\n538\t        global_idf: None,\n539\t    };\n540\t\n541\t    // Create node client with the scoped key (or node_master_key as fallback)\n542\t    let http_client = Arc::new(crate::client::HttpClient::new(\n543\t        search_key,\n544\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n545\t    ));\n546\t    let client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone());\n547\t\n548\t    // Use score-based merge strategy (OP#4: requires global IDF)\n549\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n550\t\n551\t    // Register for query coalescing (plan §13.10) - after try_coalesce, before scatter\n552\t    // Only register if coalescing is enabled and this is a single-target query\n553\t    let (tx, fingerprint) = if state.config.query_coalescing.enabled && resolved_targets.len() == 1 {\n554\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n555\t        let query_body = serde_json::to_value(&body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n556\t        let fp = QueryFingerprint::new(effective_index.clone(), &query_body, settings_version);\n557\t\n558\t        match state.query_coalescer.register(fp.clone()).await {\n559\t            Ok(broadcast_tx) => {\n560\t                state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(1); // First subscriber = the query itself\n561\t                (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp))\n562\t            }\n563\t            Err(_) => {\n564\t                // Failed to register (too many pending queries) - proceed without coalescing\n565\t                debug!(\"too many pending queries, proceeding without coalescing registration\");\n566\t                (None, None)\n567\t            }\n568\t        }\n569\t    } else {\n570\t        (None, None)\n571\t    };\n572\t\n573\t    // Execute DFS &strategy,\n581\t    )\n582\t    .await\n583\t    .map_err(|e| {\n584\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"search failed\");\n585\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n586\t state.metrics.inc_scatter_partial_responses();\n645\t    }\n646\t\n647\t    if result.degraded && !result.failed_shards.is_empty() {\n648\t        let mut sorted_shards = info, instrument};\n39\t\n40\tuse crate::client::HttpClient;\n41\tuse crate::middleware::SessionId;\n42\tuse crate::routes::admin_endpoints::AppState;\n43\t\n44\t/// Document write parameters from query string.\n45\t#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\n46\tpub struct DocumentsParams {\n47\t    primaryKey: Option<String>,\n48\t}\n49\t\n50\t/// Task response (Meilisearch-compatible).\n51\t#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n52\tpub struct TaskResponse {\n53\t    taskUid: u64,\n54\t    indexUid: String,\n55\t    status: String,\n56\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n57\t    error: Option<Value>,\n58\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n59\t    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n60\t    error_type: Option<String>,\n61\t}\n62\t\n63\t/// Response for write operations.\n64\t#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n65\tpub struct DocumentsWriteResponse {\n66\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n67\t    taskUid: Option<String>, // Changed to String to hold mtask-<uuid>\n68\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n69\t    indexUid: Option<String>,\n70\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n71\t    status: Option<String>,\n72\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n73\t    error: Option<String>,\n74\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n75\t    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n76\t    error_type: Option<String>,\n77\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n78\t    code: Option<String>,\n79\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n80\t    link: Option<String>,\n81\t}\n82\t\n83\t/// Header name for degraded write responses.\n84\tpub const HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED: &str = \"X-Miroir-Degraded\";\n85\t\n86\t/// Header name for idempotency key.\n87\tpub const HEADER_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY: &str = \"Idempotency-Key\";\n88\t\n89\t/// Compute SHA256 hash of request body for idempotency check.\n90\tfn compute_body_hash(documents: &Value) -> String {\n91\t    let canonical = if let Some(arr) = documents.as_array() {\n92\t        // Sort array elements by primary key for deterministic hash\n93\t        let mut sorted: Vec<_> = arr.iter().collect();\n94\t        sorted.sort_by_key(|doc| {\n95\t            doc.get(\"id\")\n96\t                .or_else(|| doc.get(\"pk\"))\n97\t                .or_else(|| doc.get(\"key\"))\n98\t                .or_else(|| doc.get(\"_id\"))\n99\t                .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n100\t                .unwrap_or(\"\")\n101\t        });\n102\t        serde_json::to_string(&sorted).unwrap_or_default()\n103\t    } else {\n104\t        serde_json::to_string(documents).unwrap_or_default()\n105\t    };\n106\t\n107\t    let mut hasher = Sha256::new();\n108\t    hasher.update(canonical.as_bytes());\n109\t    format!(\"{:x}\", hasher.finalize())\n110\t}\n111\t\n112\t/// Extract idempotency key from headers.\n113\t/// Returns None if header is missing or invalid.\n114\tfn extract_idempotency_key(headers: &HeaderMap) -> Option<String> {\n115\t    headers\n116\t        .get(HEADER_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY)\n117\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n118\t        .filter(|s| !s.is_empty())\n119\t        .map(|s| s.to_string())\n120\t}\n121\t\n122\t/// Quorum tracking state for write operations.\n123\t#[derive(Debug, Default)]\n124\tstruct QuorumState {\n125\t    /// Per-group ACK counts: group_id -> successful_ack_count\n126\t    group_acks: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n127\t    /// Per-group total node counts: group_id -> total_nodes_attempted\n128\t    group_totals: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n129\t    /// Groups that met quorum: group_id -> true\n130\t    groups_met_quorum: HashMap<u32, bool>,\n131\t    /// Total degraded groups count\n132\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n133\t}\n134\t\n135\timpl QuorumState {\n136\t    /// Record a write attempt to a node.\n137\t    fn record_attempt(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n138\t        *self.group_totals.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n139\t    }\n140\t\n141\t    /// Record a successful write ACK from a node.\n142\t    fn record_success(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n143\t        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n144\t    }\n145\t\n146\t    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n147\t    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n148\t        // Track that this group had a failure\n149\t        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n150\t    }\n151\t\n152\t    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n153\t    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n154\t        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n155\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n156\t        let met = acks >= quorum;\n157\t        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n158\t        met\n159\t    }\n160\t\n161\t    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n162\t    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n163\t        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n164\t    }\n165\t\n166\t    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n167\t    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n168\t        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n169\t        for group_id in 0..replica_group_count {\n170\t            if !self.check_group_quorum(group_id, rf) {\n171\t                // Only count as degraded if we attempted to write to this group\n172\t                if self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n173\t                    degraded += 1;\n174\t                }\n175\t            }\n176\t        }\n177\t        degraded\n178\t    }\n179\t}\n180\t\n181\t/// Build router for document endpoints.\n182\tpub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\n183\twhere\n184\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n185\t{\n186\t    Router::new()\n187\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n188\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::put(put_documents))\n189\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n190\t        .route(\"/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document_by_id))\n191\t}\n192\t\n193\t/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents - Add documents.\n194\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n195\tasync fn post_documents(\n196\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n197\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n198\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n199\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n200\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n201\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n202\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n203\t    // Extract session ID from request extensions (set by session_pinning_middleware)\n204\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n205\t        let s = ext.0;\n206\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n207\t    });\n208\t\n209\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid, Some(headers)).await\n210\t}\n211\t\n212\t/// PUT /indexes/{uid}/documents - Replace documents.\n213\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n214\tasync fn put_documents(\n215\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n216\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n217\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n218\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n219\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n220\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n221\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n222\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n223\t        let s = ext.0;\n224\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n225\t    });\n226\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid, Some(headers)).await\n227\t}\n228\t\n229\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents - Delete by IDs or filter.\n230\tasync fn delete_documents(\n231\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n232\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n233\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n234\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n235\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n236\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n237\t        let s = ext.0;\n238\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n239\t    });\n240\t\n241\t    // Try to parse as delete by filter first\n242\t    if let Some(filter) = body.get(\"filter\") {\n243\t        let req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n244\t            index_uid: index.clone(),\n245\t            filter: filter.clone(),\n246\t            origin: None, // Client write\n247\t        };\n248\t        return delete_by_filter_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await;\n249\t    }\n250\t\n251\t    // Try to parse as delete by IDs\n252\t    if let Some(ids) = body.get(\"ids\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n253\t        let ids: Vec<String> = ids\n254\t            .iter()\n255\t            .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(|s| s.to_string()))\n256\t            .collect();\n257\t        if !ids.is_empty() {\n258\t            let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n259\t                index_uid: index.clone(),\n260\t                ids,\n261\t                origin: None, // Client write\n262\t            };\n263\t            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await;\n264\t        }\n265\t    }\n266\t\n267\t    // If we get here, the request body is malformed\n268\t    Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n269\t        MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n270\t        \"delete request must include either 'filter' or 'ids' field\",\n271\t    ))\n272\t}\n273\t\n274\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id} - Delete single document by ID.\n275\tasync fn delete_document_by_id(\n276\t    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n277\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n278\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n279\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n280\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n281\t        let s = ext.0;\n282\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n283\t    });\n284\t    let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n285\t        index_uid: index.clone(),\n286\t        ids: vec![id],\n287\t        origin: None, // Client write\n288\t    };\n289\t    delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await\n290\t}\n291\t\n292\t/// Implementation for write documents (POST/PUT).\n293\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index, session_id))]\n294\tasync fn write_documents_impl(\n295\t    index: String,\n296\t    primary_key: Option<String>,\n297\t    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n298\t    state: &AppState,\n299\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n300\t    headers: Option<HeaderMap>,\n301\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n302\t    if documents.is_empty() {\n303\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n304\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n305\t            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n306\t        ));\n307\t    }\n308\t\n309\t    // Check idempotency if enabled (plan §13.10)\n310\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n311\t        if let Some(ref headers) = headers {\n312\t            if let Some(idempotency_key) = extract_idempotency_key(headers) {\n313\t                let body_hash = compute_body_hash(&serde_json::to_value(&documents).unwrap_or(Value::Null));\n314\t\n315\t                // Check cache for existing entry\n316\t                match state.idempotency_cache.check(&idempotency_key, &body_hash).await {\n317\t                    Ok(Some(cached_mtask_id)) => {\n318\t                        // Idempotency hit - return cached mtask ID\n319\t                        state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"dedup\");\n320\t                        debug!(\n321\t                            idempotency_key = %idempotency_key,\n322\t                            cached_mtask_id = %cached_mtask_id,\n323\t                            \"idempotency hit - returning cached mtask ID\"\n324\t                        );\n325\t                        return Ok(build_response_with_degraded_header(\n326\t                            DocumentsWriteResponse {\n327\t                                taskUid: Some(cached_mtask_id),\n328\t                                indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n329\t                                status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n330\t                                error: None,\n331\t                                error_type: None,\n332\t                                code: None,\n333\t                                link: None,\n334\t                            },\n335\t                            0, // No degradation on cached response\n336\t                        )?);\n337\t                    }\n338\t                    Err(MiroirError::IdempotencyKeyReused) => {\n339\t                        // Same key, different body - return 409 Conflict\n340\t                        state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"conflict\");\n341\t                        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n342\t                            MiroirCode::IdempotencyKeyReused,\n343\t                            \"idempotency key was already used with a different request body\",\n344\t                        ));\n345\t                    }\n346\t                    Ok(None) => {\n347\t                        // Cache miss - proceed with write\n348\t                        state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n349\t                        debug!(\n350\t                            idempotency_key = %idempotency_key,\n351\t                            \"idempotency miss - proceeding with write\"\n352\t                        );\n353\t                    }\n354\t                    Err(_) => {\n355\t                        // Other error - proceed with write (fail-open)\n356\t                        state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n357\t                    }\n358\t                }\n359\t            }\n360\t        }\n361\t    }\n362\t\n363\t    // 1. Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n364\t    // Aliases are resolved before any processing; writes to multi-target aliases are rejected\n365\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n366\t        // Check if the index is an alias\n367\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n368\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n369\t            // It was an alias\n370\t            // Check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only, ILM-managed)\n371\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n372\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n373\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n374\t                    format!(\n375\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); writes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n376\t                        index\n377\t                    ),\n378\t                ));\n379\t            }\n380\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n381\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n382\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n383\t        } else {\n384\t            // Not an alias, use the index name as-is\n385\t            index.clone()\n386\t        }\n387\t    } else {\n388\t        index.clone()\n389\t    };\n390\t\n391\t    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n392\t    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n393\t        documents\n394\t            .first()\n395\t            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n396\t    });\n397\t\n398\t    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n399\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n400\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n401\t            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n402\t        )\n403\t    })?;\n404\t\n405\t    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n406\t    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n407\t    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n408\t    let ttl_enabled = state.config.ttl.enabled;\n409\t    let expires_at_field = &state.config.ttl.expires_at_field;\n410\t\n411\t    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n412\t        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n413\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n414\t        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n415\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n416\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n417\t                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n418\t            ));\n419\t        }\n420\t\n421\t        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n422\t        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n423\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n424\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n425\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n426\t            ));\n427\t        }\n428\t\n429\t        // _miroir_expires_at is reserved ONLY when ttl.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.14)\n430\t        // When reserved, clients cannot SET it; the orchestrator controls it. When disabled,\n431\t        // client values pass through end-to-end.\n432\t        if ttl_enabled && doc.get(expires_at_field).is_some() {\n433\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n434\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n435\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", expires_at_field),\n436\t            ));\n437\t        }\n438\t\n439\t        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n440\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n441\t                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n442\t                format!(\n443\t                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n444\t                    i, primary_key\n445\t                ),\n446\t            ));\n447\t        }\n448\t    }\n449\t\n450\t    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard and _miroir_updated_at into each document\n451\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n452\t    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n453\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n454\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n455\t\n456\t    // Get current timestamp in milliseconds since epoch for _miroir_updated_at stamping\n457\t    let now_ms = if anti_entropy_enabled {\n458\t        Some(\n459\t            std::time::SystemTime::now()\n460\t                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n461\t                .unwrap_or_default()\n462\t                .as_millis() as u64\n463\t        )\n464\t    } else {\n465\t        None\n466\t    };\n467\t\n468\t    for doc in &mut documents {\n469\t        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n470\t            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n471\t            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n472\t        }\n473\t\n474\t        // Stamp _miroir_updated_at when anti_entropy is enabled (plan §13.8)\n475\t        // This happens AFTER reserved field validation, so orchestrator-controlled injection is allowed\n476\t        if let Some(timestamp) = now_ms {\n477\t            doc[updated_at_field] = serde_json::json!(timestamp);\n478\t        }\n479\t    }\n480\t\n481\t    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n482\t    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n483\t\n484\t    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n485\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n486\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n487\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n488\t    );\n489\t\n490\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n491\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n492\t\n493\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n494\t    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n495\t        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n496\t        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n497\t            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n498\t            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n499\t                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n500\t                    c.read().await\n501\t                })\n502\t            })\n503\t        });\n504\t\n505\t        // Use migration-aware routing\n506\t        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n507\t            shard_id,\n508\t            &topology,\n509\t            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n510\t        );\n511\t\n512\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n513\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n514\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n515\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n516\t            ));\n517\t        }\n518\t\n519\t        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n520\t\n521\t        for node_id in targets {\n522\t            let node = topology\n523\t                .node(&node_id)\n524\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n525\t\n526\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n527\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n528\t\n529\t            let req = WriteRequest {\n530\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n531\t                documents: docs.clone(),\n532\t                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n533\t                origin: None, // Client write\n534\t            };\n535\t\n536\t            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n537\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n538\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n539\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n540\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n541\t                    }\n542\t                }\n543\t                Ok(resp) => {\n544\t                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n545\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n546\t                }\n547\t                Err(_) => {\n548\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n549\t                }\n550\t            }\n551\t        }\n552\t    }\n553\t\n554\t    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n555\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n556\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n557\t\n558\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n559\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n560\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n561\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n562\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n563\t        ));\n564\t    }\n565\t\n566\t    // 6.5. Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n567\t    // Groups are checked in ascending order, so the first one with quorum is the first\n568\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n569\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n570\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n571\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n572\t            acks >= quorum\n573\t        })\n574\t        .unwrap_or(0); // Default to group 0 if somehow no quorum (shouldn't happen here)\n575\t\n576\t    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n577\t    let miroir_task = state\n578\t        .task_registry\n579\t        .register_with_metadata(\n580\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n581\t            Some(index_uid.clone()),\n582\t            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n583\t        )\n584\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n585\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n586\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n587\t        ))?;\n588\t\n589\t    // 7.2. Insert into idempotency cache if key was provided (plan §13.10)\n590\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n591\t        if let Some(ref headers) = headers {\n592\t            if let Some(idempotency_key) = extract_idempotency_key(headers) {\n593\t                let body_hash = compute_body_hash(&serde_json::to_value(&documents).unwrap_or(Value::Null));\n594\t                state.idempotency_cache.insert(\n595\t                    idempotency_key,\n596\t                    body_hash,\n597\t                    miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n598\t                ).await;\n599\t                debug!(\n600\t                    mtask_id = %miroir_task.miroir_id,\n601\t                    \"inserted idempotency cache entry\"\n602\t                );\n603\t            }\n604\t        }\n605\t    }\n606\t\n607\t    // 7.5. Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n608\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n609\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n610\t            sid,\n611\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n612\t            first_quorum_group,\n613\t        ).await {\n614\t            // Log error but don't fail the write - session pinning is best-effort\n615\t            tracing::error!(\n616\t                session_id = %sid,\n617\t                error = %e,\n618\t                \"failed to record session pinning for write\"\n619\t            );\n620\t        }\n621\t    }\n622\t\n623\t    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n624\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n625\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n626\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n627\t            indexUid: Some(index_uid.clone()),\n628\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n629\t            error: None,\n630\t            error_type: None,\n631\t            code: None,\n632\t            link: None,\n633\t        },\n634\t        degraded_groups,\n635\t    )\n636\t}\n637\t\n638\t/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\n639\tasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n640\t    index: String,\n641\t    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n642\t    state: &AppState,\n643\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n644\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n645\t    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n646\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n647\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n648\t            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n649\t        ));\n650\t    }\n651\t\n652\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n653\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n654\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n655\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n656\t            // It was an alias - check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only)\n657\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n658\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n659\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n660\t                    format!(\n661\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); deletes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n662\t                        index\n663\t                    ),\n664\t                ));\n665\t            }\n666\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n667\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n668\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n669\t        } else {\n670\t            index.clone()\n671\t        }\n672\t    } else {\n673\t        index.clone()\n674\t    };\n675\t\n676\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n677\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n678\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n679\t\n680\t    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n681\t    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n682\t    for id in &req.ids {\n683\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n684\t        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n685\t    }\n686\t\n687\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n688\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n689\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n690\t    );\n691\t\n692\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n693\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n694\t\n695\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n696\t    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n697\t        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n698\t\n699\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n700\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n701\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n702\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n703\t            ));\n704\t        }\n705\t\n706\t        for node_id in targets {\n707\t            let node = topology\n708\t                .node(&node_id)\n709\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n710\t\n711\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n712\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n713\t\n714\t            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n715\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n716\t                ids: ids.clone(),\n717\t                origin: None, // Client write\n718\t            };\n719\t\n720\t            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n721\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n722\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n723\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n724\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n725\t                    }\n726\t                }\n727\t                Ok(resp) => {\n728\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n729\t                }\n730\t                Err(_) => {\n731\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n732\t                }\n733\t            }\n734\t        }\n735\t    }\n736\t\n737\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n738\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n739\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n740\t\n741\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n742\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n743\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n744\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n745\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n746\t        ));\n747\t    }\n748\t\n749\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n750\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n751\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n752\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n753\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n754\t            acks >= quorum\n755\t        })\n756\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n757\t\n758\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n759\t    let miroir_task = state\n760\t        .task_registry\n761\t        .register_with_metadata(\n762\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n763\t            Some(index.clone()),\n764\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n765\t        )\n766\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n767\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n768\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n769\t        ))?;\n770\t\n771\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n772\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n773\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n774\t            sid,\n775\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n776\t            first_quorum_group,\n777\t        ).await {\n778\t            tracing::error!(\n779\t                session_id = %sid,\n780\t                error = %e,\n781\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete\"\n782\t            );\n783\t        }\n784\t    }\n785\t\n786\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n787\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n788\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n789\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n790\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n791\t            error: None,\n792\t            error_type: None,\n793\t            code: None,\n794\t            link: None,\n795\t        },\n796\t        degraded_groups,\n797\t    )\n798\t}\n799\t\n800\t/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\n801\tasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n802\t    index: String,\n803\t    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n804\t    state: &AppState,\n805\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n806\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n807\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n808\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n809\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n810\t\n811\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n812\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n813\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n814\t    );\n815\t\n816\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n817\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n818\t\n819\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n820\t    for node in topology.nodes() {\n821\t        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n822\t        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n823\t\n824\t        match client\n825\t            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n826\t            .await\n827\t        {\n828\t            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n829\t                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n830\t                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n831\t                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n832\t                }\n833\t            }\n834\t            Ok(resp) => {\n835\t                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n836\t            }\n837\t            Err(_) => {\n838\t                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n839\t            }\n840\t        }\n841\t    }\n842\t\n843\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n844\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n845\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n846\t\n847\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n848\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n849\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n850\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n851\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n852\t        ));\n853\t    }\n854\t\n855\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n856\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n857\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n858\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n859\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n860\t            acks >= quorum\n861\t        })\n862\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n863\t\n864\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n865\t    let miroir_task = state\n866\t        .task_registry\n867\t        .register_with_metadata(\n868\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n869\t            Some(index.clone()),\n870\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n871\t        )\n872\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n873\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n874\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n875\t        ))?;\n876\t\n877\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n878\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n879\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n880\t            sid,\n881\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n882\t            first_quorum_group,\n883\t        ).await {\n884\t            tracing::error!(\n885\t                session_id = %sid,\n886\t                error = %e,\n887\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete by filter\"\n888\t            );\n889\t        }\n890\t    }\n891\t\n892\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n893\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n894\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n895\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n896\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n897\t            error: None,\n898\t            error_type: None,\n899\t            code: None,\n900\t            link: None,\n901\t        },\n902\t        degraded_groups,\n903\t    )\n904\t}\n905\t\n906\t/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n907\t///\n908\t/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\n909\tfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n910\t    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n911\t        .iter()\n912\t        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n913\t        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n914\t}\n915\t\n916\t/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n917\t///\n918\t/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n919\t/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n920\t///\n921\t/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\n922\tfn group_documents_by_shard(\n923\t    documents: &[Value],\n924\t    primary_key: &str,\n925\t    topology: &Topology,\n926\t) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n927\t    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n928\t\n929\t    for doc in documents {\n930\t        let pk_value = doc\n931\t            .get(primary_key)\n932\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n933\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n934\t                MeilisearchError::new(\n935\t                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n936\t                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n937\t                )\n938\t            })?;\n939\t\n940\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n941\t        shard_documents\n942\t            .entry(shard_id)\n943\t            .or_default()\n944\t            .push(doc.clone());\n945\t    }\n946\t\n947\t    Ok(shard_documents)\n948\t}\n949\t\n950\t/// Build an error response from a node error.\n951\tfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n952\t    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n953\t        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n954\t        indexUid: None,\n955\t        status: None,\n956\t        error: resp.message,\n957\t        error_type: resp.error_type,\n958\t        code: resp.code,\n959\t        link: None,\n960\t    }\n961\t}\n962\t\n963\t/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\n964\tfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n965\t    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n966\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n967\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n968\t    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n969\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n970\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n971\t            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n972\t        )\n973\t    })?;\n974\t\n975\t    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n976\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n977\t        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n978\t\n979\t    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n980\t    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n981\t        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n982\t    }\n983\t\n984\t    Ok(builder\n985\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n986\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n987\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n988\t            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n989\t        ))?)\n990\t}\n991\t\n992\t/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\n993\tfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n994\t    (\n995\t        StatusCode::OK,\n996\t        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n997\t        Json(resp),\n998\t    )\n999\t        .into_response()\n1000\t}\n1001\t\n1002\t#[cfg(test)]\n1003\tmod tests {\n1004\t    use super::*;\n1005\t    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n1006\t    use serde_json::json;\n1007\t\n1008\t    #[test]\n1009\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_common_fields() {\n1010\t        let doc_with_id = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test123\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1011\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_id), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n1012\t\n1013\t        let doc_with_pk = serde_json::json!({\"pk\": \"test456\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1014\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_pk), Some(\"pk\".to_string()));\n1015\t\n1016\t        let doc_with_key = serde_json::json!({\"key\": \"test789\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1017\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_key), Some(\"key\".to_string()));\n1018\t\n1019\t        let doc_with__id = serde_json::json!({\"_id\": \"test000\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1020\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with__id), Some(\"_id\".to_string()));\n1021\t    }\n1022\t\n1023\t    #[test]\n1024\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_no_common_field() {\n1025\t        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"name\": \"Test\", \"value\": 42});\n1026\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), None);\n1027\t    }\n1028\t\n1029\t    #[test]\n1030\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_priority() {\n1031\t        // Should return \"id\" first even if other fields exist\n1032\t        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"pk\": \"other\", \"key\": \"another\"});\n1033\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n1034\t    }\n1035\t\n1036\t    // Reserved field validation tests (P2.9)\n1037\t    //\n1038\t    // Tests the reserved field matrix per plan §5:\n1039\t    // - `_miroir_shard`: Always reserved (unconditional)\n1040\t    // - `_miroir_updated_at`: Reserved only when `anti_entropy.enabled: true`\n1041\t    // - `_miroir_expires_at`: Reserved only when `ttl.enabled: true`\n1042\t\n1043\t    /// Helper to build the expected reserved field error.\n1044\t    fn reserved_field_error(field: &str) -> MeilisearchError {\n1045\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n1046\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n1047\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}`\", field),\n1048\t        )\n1049\t    }\n1050\t\n1051\t    #[test]\n1052\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_shard_always_rejected() {\n1053\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved regardless of config\n1054\t        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n1055\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n1056\t        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n1057\t        assert_eq!(err.error_type, miroir_core::api_error::ErrorType::InvalidRequest);\n1058\t    }\n1059\t\n1060\t    #[test]\n1061\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_updated_at_when_anti_entropy_enabled() {\n1062\t        // When anti_entropy.enabled: true, _miroir_updated_at is reserved\n1063\t        let field = \"_miroir_updated_at\";\n1064\t        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n1065\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n1066\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", field),\n1067\t        );\n1068\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n1069\t        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n1070\t    }\n1071\t\n1072\t    #[test]\n1073\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_expires_at_when_ttl_enabled() {\n1074\t        // When ttl.enabled: true, _miroir_expires_at is reserved\n1075\t        let field = \"_miroir_expires_at\";\n1076\t        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n1077\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n1078\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", field),\n1079\t        );\n1080\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n1081\t        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n1082\t    }\n1083\t\n1084\t    #[test]\n1085\t    fn test_reserved_field_non_miroir_fields_allowed() {\n1086\t        // Non-reserved _miroir_ fields are allowed\n1087\t        let doc = json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_custom\": }\n78\t        }\n79\t\n80\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n81\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n82\t        } else {\n83\t            0.0\n84\t        };\n85\t\n86\t
